message:
feat(evidence): add fail-closed path hygiene validation to BeadCoverageLink

Harden BeadCoverageLink evidence path handling with strict validation:

- Add try_new() constructor that validates all test_file paths are
  repo-relative (rejects absolute paths including Windows C:\ format),
  traversal-safe (rejects .. components), non-empty, and deduplicated
  after whitespace normalization
- Add validate_path_hygiene() method that applies the same validation
  to log_artifacts at serialization time
- to_jsonl_line() now calls validate_path_hygiene() as a fail-closed
  guard before serialization
- Change BeadCoverageLink::new() test_files parameter from Vec<String>
  to &[String] to avoid unnecessary ownership transfer

Add 6 tests covering: absolute path rejection (Unix + Windows), parent
traversal rejection in log_artifacts, repo-relative path acceptance with
JSONL round-trip, and duplicate detection in both test_files and
log_artifacts after normalization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
